query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(userId, deviceId)) as active_solvers_15min
FROM puzzle_attempts 
WHERE createdAt >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE;

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(userId, deviceId)) as active_solvers_1hr
FROM puzzle_attempts 
WHERE createdAt >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
